name: MikroTik cAP LTE12 ax
title: MikroTik cAP LTE12 ax
title_extended: MikroTik cAP LTE12 ax – WiFi 6 Ceiling AP with LTE Cat12

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Wireless Connectivity
detailed_description.text: When you need dependable wireless connectivity in high-traffic areas, the MikroTik cAP LTE12 ax (cAPGi-5HaxD2HaxD&EG12-EA) is the perfect solution. Whether you’re managing a bustling coffee shop, a festival food stand, or a pop-up retail store, this device offers powerful and discreet performance. It delivers fast, reliable mobile internet with its integrated CAT12 LTE modem and Wi-Fi 6 technology. The cAP LTE12 ax ensures that both you and your clients enjoy seamless connectivity even in busy settings. Its sleek design allows it to blend seamlessly into any environment, making it an unobtrusive yet effective solution for reliable business operations. The cAP LTE12 ax makes network installation and maintenance easier with Power-over-Ethernet (PoE) support for both input and output. You can power other devices, such as network switches, CCTV cameras, or additional access points, directly from the cAP LTE12 ax. Additionally, the CAPsMAN central management system simplifies the setup of multiple devices.

detailed_description.heading: Optimal Performance
detailed_description.text: The Wi-Fi 6 capabilities of the cAP LTE12 ax unlock the full potential of its CAT12 LTE modem, offering speeds up to 600 Mbps. Compared to previous generations, this results in up to 40% higher speeds in the 5 GHz band and up to 90% higher speeds in the 2.4 GHz band. Traditional access points often face issues like interference, damage, or theft in high-traffic spaces. The cAP LTE12 ax solves this with a ceiling-mountable design, ensuring optimal signal distribution and reducing interference from physical obstacles. By mounting the device on the ceiling, you also minimize the risk of theft or accidental damage. This setup keeps your workspace tidy by reducing the number of cables and devices in the area. This combination of enhanced signal strength, security, and a cleaner workspace makes the cAP LTE12 ax a smart choice for businesses looking to streamline their network infrastructure.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Features
detailed_description.text: The cAP LTE12 ax is powered by a robust quad-core ARM CPU running at 1.8 GHz and backed by 1 GB of RAM. This powerhouse supports the highly flexible RouterOS v7, providing more than just basic connectivity. The device offers advanced features such as complex firewall rules, IPsec hardware encryption, Wireguard support, and multiple VPN tunnels. This versatility ensures secure connections for remote work, file-sharing, and even light BGP routing. Wi-Fi 6 also improves energy efficiency and security with support for OWE/WPA3-PSK/WPA3-EAP encryption and management frame protection. These features help protect against various cyber threats like brute-force attacks and deauthentication attacks. This level of security ensures that your business data and client information remain protected, even in public or high-traffic environments.
